entries.definition:
كتاب الفاء

فني - فند

(فند) الفاء والنون والدال أصلٌ صحيح يدلُّ على ثِقَل وشدة، ويقال

f–n–d branch, to branch out, faction; to be weak of mind or
body, to become senile; to lie; to refute, to dispute; to err; to fall
into factions, to take refuge. Of this root, تُفَنِّدُون tufannidūn, occurs
once in the Qur’an.

تُفَنِّد tufannid [imperf. of v. II, trans.] to refute, to deny; to
describe as senile (12:94) إِنِّي لَأَجِدُ رِيحَ يُوسُفَ لَوْلَا أَنْ تُفَنِّدُونِ I sense
[find] Joseph’s scent, even though you may think I am senile.
